title: Build your wedding website
subtitle: Customize the public page your guests will see at /w/your-slug.

steps.title: Start with the basics
steps.body: Enter your names, wedding date, and location. These power the simple page on every plan and are reused across the site as defaults.
steps.tip: On the Free plan you get a clean simple page — upgrade to unlock hero images, sections, and AI editing.

steps.title: Reorder your sections
steps.body: The Sections panel on the left lists every block on your page (Hero, About, Timeline, Agenda, RSVP, Contact, etc.). Use the up/down buttons to reorder — the live preview updates instantly.
steps.tip: Hide a section by removing its content; empty sections won't show on the public page.

steps.title: Edit content inline
steps.body: Open the Inline Content panel to write your About text, set the dress code, and add a hero image URL. Changes auto-save after a brief pause.
steps.tip: Use a high-resolution photo for the hero — it's the first thing guests see.

steps.title: Let Clawed Bot help
steps.body: On Starter and Premium plans, ask Clawed Bot in plain language: "create a modern page with timeline first" or "change the theme to navy and gold." The bot rewrites your config for you.
steps.tip: Each command uses a small number of AI tokens — check the counter under the chat box.
